zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Cherlelton於大約1335年出生在英國時，她的父親John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis29歲，母親Maud Mortimer21歲。她於大約1351年4月17日與Sir John de Beauchamp在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1374年之前在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Cherlelton于大约1335年出生在英国时，她的父亲John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis29岁，母亲Maud Mortimer21岁。她于大约1351年4月17日与Sir John de Beauchamp在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1374年之前在她的家乡。

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Cherlelton was born about 1335, in England, her father, John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis, was 29 and her mother, Maud Mortimer, was 21. She married Sir John de Beauchamp about 17 April 1351, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 1374, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Cherlelton est née environ 1335, à Angleterre, son père, John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Maud Mortimer, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Beauchamp environ 17 avril 1351, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1374, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Cherlelton um 1335 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis 29 und ihre Mutter Maud Mortimer 21. Sie hat um 17. April 1351 in England, United Kingdom Sir John de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1374 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Cherlelton è nata il circa 1335 nel England, sua padre, John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Maud Mortimer, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Beauchamp circa 17 aprile 1351, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1374, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Cherleltonが約1335年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powisは29歳，母Maud Mortimerは21歳であった。約1351年4月17日にイギリスイギリスでSir John de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1374年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Cherlelton(이)가 대략 1335년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Mortimer(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1351년 4월 17일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir John de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1374년 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Cherlelton nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Maud Mortimer, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Beauchamp aproximadamente 17 de abril de 1351, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1374, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Cherlelton родилась около 1335 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Mortimer, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Beauchamp около 17 апреля 1351 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 1374 г. в её родном городе.

Se casó con Sir John de Beauchamp aproximadamente 17 de abril de 1351, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1374, en su pueblo.
